name: Kolacky
recipeInstructions:
1. Use various flavors of fruit spread.
2. Combine butter and cream cheese in a large bowl; beat until smooth and creamy. Blend in vanilla extract.
3. Combine flour and salt; gradually add to the butter mixture, mixing until the dough forms soft dough. Divide dough into two halves; wrap each half in plastic wrap.
4. Refrigerate until firm (at least 1 hour).
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Roll out half of the dough on a lightly floured pastry cloth or board to an 1/8 inch thickness.
7. Cut with the top of a glass or biscuit cutter into 3-inch rounds.
8. Spoon 1 tsp fruit spread onto the center of each dough circle.
9. Beat egg and water; lightly brush onto the edges of dough circles.
10. Bring three edges of dough up over the fruit spread; pinch edges together to seal.
11. Place on ungreased cookie sheets; brush with egg mixture.
12. Repeat with remaining dough and fruit spread.
13. Bake for 12 minutes, until golden brown.
14. Let stand on cookie sheets for 1 minute; transfer to a wire rack. Cool completely.
15. Store in a tightly covered container.
